case_title: CALOYANIDES, TOULA VS IVERSON, OSCAR THEDORE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT IVERSON, OSCAR THEDORE
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CALOYANIDES, TOULA AS TO DEFENDANT IVERSON, OSCAR THEDORE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-08-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALOYANIDES, TOULA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IVERSON, OSCAR THEDORE $1,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,352.00, THE COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $2000, AND ATTRIBUTES 35% COMPARATIVE FAULT OF PLAINTIFF. THIS JUDGMENT REPRESENTS NET RECOVERY TO PLAINTIFF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
